title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Colima, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/COL/AC02/SESESP/117 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources for thes coadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Durango, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/DGO/AC01/CEEAV/082 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources for thes coadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Mexico, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/MEX/AC02/SM/051 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources intended forthe support actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Morelos, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/MOR/AC01/CEARV/004 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources for thes coadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior, through the National Commission to Prevent and Eradicate Violence against Women, the State of Tabasco and the State Institute for Women, which aims togrant for the Project called C-2024-040, referring to the Support Program for Specialized Shelters for Women Victims of Gender Violence, their Daughters and Sons, for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH SECRETARIAT OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT

description: Technical Implementation Annex for the operation of the epidemiological surveillance components of pests and phytozoosanitary diseases, phytozoosanitary campaigns and agri-food, aquaculture and fisheries safety, of the Agroalim Health and Safety Programfor the 2024 budget year, held by the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development and the State of Sonora.

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH MINISTRY OF HEALTH
description: Second Amendment Agreement to the Specific Agreement on the transfer of inputs and administration of federal budgetary resources to carry out public health actions in the federal entities, held by the Ministry of Health and the Statedo de Campeche.

title: DECENTRALIZED AGENCIES INSTITUTE OF THE NATIONAL HOUSING FUND FOR WORKERS
description: Agreement approving the amendments to the Guidelines on Transparency, Access to Information, Archives and Protection of Personal Data of the Institute of the National Housing Fund for Workers.

title: SUPREME COURT OF JUSTICE OF THE NATION
description: Judgment issued by the Full Court of the Supreme Court of Justice of the Nation in Constitutional Controversy 119/2020, as well as the Individual and   Concurrent Votes of Mrs. Minister President Norma Lucía Piña Hernández.

title: JUDICIAL POWER ELECTORAL TRIBUNAL OF THE JUDICIAL POWER OF THE FEDERATION
description: Agreement 14/SO4(25-IV-2024) of the Administration Commission issued at the Fourth Ordinary Session of this year, held on April 25 of the current year, by which it approves the reforms and additions of the General Agreement of the Electoral Tribunal of the Judiciaryof the Federation, which establishes the provisions on administrative responsibilities, patrimonial situation, control, accountability and the fight against corruption.

title: AUTONOMOUS ORGANIZATIONS BANCO DE MEXICO
description: Exchange rate to settle obligations denominated in foreign currency payable in the Mexican Republic.

title: AUTONOMOUS ORGANIZATIONS BANCO DE MEXICO
description: Interbank interest rate of equilibrium of funding to one banking business day.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Information relating to balances and financial products of trusts in which the National Electoral Institute participates, which is provided in compliance with the obligation established in article 12 of the Federal Law on Budget and Fiscal Responsibility, with cutoff at 3March 1, 2024 (Trust Fund for the Compliance of the Real Estate Infrastructure Program and for Citizen Attention and Module Improvement of the National Electoral Institute).

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Information relating to balances and financial products of trusts in which the National Electoral Institute participates, which is provided in compliance with the obligation established in article 12 of the Federal Law on Budget and Fiscal Responsibility, with cutoff at 3March 1, 2024 (Trust Fund to Meet the Labor Liabilities of the National Electoral Institute).
